news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches RKTL: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Rocket Companies, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: RKTL is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 82.65%, Rocket Cos Swap Nomura-L at 53.83%, Rocket Cos Inc Swap Nbc-L at 41.01%, Rocket Cos Swap Cant-L_R at 36.61%, and Rocket Cos Swap Cs-L at 35.48%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RKT ETF (RKTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Rocket Companies, Inc. (NYSE: RKT), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. RKTL was launched on Jan 12, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
